de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessValue

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessValue
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ISymbolicElement, ISymbolicValue
    Enclosing class:
    SymbolicLayoutReader

    public static class SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessValue
extends SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
implements ISymbolicValue
    An implementation of ISymbolicValue which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Term getArrayIndex()
      Returns the represented array index or null if a program variable is represented..

      Returns the human readable array index or null if a program variable is represented..

      Returns the optional condition under which this value is valid.

      Returns the optional condition under which this value is valid as human readable String.

      • getCondition

        public Term getCondition()

        Returns the optional condition under which this value is valid.

        The condition should be null by default. Only in rare cases, e.g. path condition is not strong enough to describe the path completely, is a condition is provided.

        Specified by:
        getCondition in interface ISymbolicValue
        Returns:
        The optional condition under which this value is valid.

      • getConditionString

        public String getConditionString()

        Returns the optional condition under which this value is valid as human readable String.

        The condition should be null by default. Only in rare cases, e.g. path condition is not strong enough to describe the path completely, is a condition is provided.

        Specified by:
        getConditionString in interface ISymbolicValue
        Returns:
        The optional condition under which this value is valid as human readable String.
